title: citrus macracantha
intro: Citrus macracantha, also known as the yellow seville or wild orange, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, characterized by its thorny branches and fragrant flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Citrus macracantha include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing antioxidant support. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or essential oils, and is also used as a flavoring agent in traditional medicine and culinary applications.
